parameters.query: insert into fila_precall (id,event_uri,lead_nome,telefone,closer,step,message,send_at,start_time,channel,subject,email) values ('{{ $json.id }}','{{ $json.event_uri }}',$N${{ $json.lead_nome }}$N$,'{{ $json.telefone }}',$N${{ $json.closer }}$N$,'{{ $json.step }}',$N${{ $json.message }}$N$,'{{ $json.send_at }}','{{ $json.start_time }}','{{ $json.channel }}',$N${{ $json.subject }}$N$,'{{ $json.email }}') on conflict (id) do nothing;
